title: Make recommendations vary by prompt intent
description: Different natural-language prompts can return the same recommendations after live Spotify profile sync because Spotify-only profile candidates lack audio features and receive neutral mood scores while taste/popularity dominate. Add regression coverage and make ranking prefer prompt-sensitive catalog candidates when mood features are available.
close_reason: Adjusted ranking to make prompt mood dominant and prevent featureless profile candidates from swamping prompt-sensitive tracks.

title: Fix local demo scripts without API key
description: The local demo helper scripts fail with set -u when RECOMMENDER_API_KEY is unset because they expand an empty header array. Make the scripts work for no-auth local demos and API-key demos.
close_reason: Fixed demo helper scripts for no-auth local runs and isolated recommendation test profile cache state.

title: Implement session persistence and playlist validation
description: Implement plans/session-persistence-playlist-validation.md: persist recommendation sessions, validate playlist creation and feedback against session recommendations, update docs, and validate the local JSON-first flow.
close_reason: Implemented session persistence and playlist validation.

title: Fix live Spotify profile review findings
description: Address PR review findings from live Spotify profile strengthening: add Spotify synced tracks as recommendation candidates, continue playlist enrichment after inaccessible playlists, avoid promoting weak signals to liked artists, and make live-profile readiness scope validation read-only.
close_reason: Fixed PR review findings and added regression coverage.

title: Implement Spotify profile extraction and S3 data readiness
description: Start implementation of plans/20260709-1204-spotify-profile-s3-deployment.md by adding authenticated Spotify profile extraction datasets, aligning S3 recommender reads with extractor output, and adding readiness/tests for the S3 path.
close_reason: Implemented and validated the first slice: Spotify profile medallion extraction, S3 reader alignment, S3 readiness command, docs, and tests.

title: Plan Spotify profile extraction and S3 deployment gaps
description: Create a repo-aware implementation plan for fetching recommender data from both seed artists and the authenticated Spotify user profile, then preparing S3-backed data/API deployment steps.
close_reason: Created plans/20260709-1204-spotify-profile-s3-deployment.md with repo, Spotify, AWS, S3, and deployment gap analysis.

title: Document local demo runbook
description: Create a Markdown runbook for local testing of the API-only recommender demo, including prerequisites, environment variables, command sequence, and expected outputs.
close_reason: Added local API demo runbook and documented env readiness gaps.

title: Plan session persistence and playlist validation
description: Create an implementation plan for persisting recommendation sessions and validating Spotify playlist creation against session recommendation output before implementation.
close_reason: Created session persistence and playlist validation implementation plan.

title: Implement live Spotify profile strengthening
description: Implement plans/live-spotify-profile-strengthening.md on the current branch: paginated Spotify saved/top/playlist reads, richer profile sync metadata and affinities, API contract updates, readiness/docs updates, and validation without live Spotify calls.
acceptance_criteria: Profile sync can read paginated saved tracks, top items, and selected playlists using fakes in tests; cached profile metadata remains backward compatible; recommendation requests use cached profile affinities; docs/scripts describe the live Spotify flow; validation commands pass.
close_reason: Implemented live Spotify profile strengthening: paginated saved/top/playlist reads, enriched profile metadata and affinities, API sync controls, readiness checks, docs, scripts, and validation without live Spotify calls.

title: Plan live Spotify profile strengthening
description: Create a repo-aware implementation plan for strengthening the live Spotify profile path before adding DynamoDB: robust OAuth readiness, paginated saved tracks and top items, richer taste profile signals, API/script support, and tests without live Spotify calls.
acceptance_criteria: A Markdown implementation plan exists under plans/ for live Spotify profile strengthening; it reflects the current repo code and official Spotify user endpoint constraints; it explicitly excludes DynamoDB as a core requirement for this step.
close_reason: Created plans/live-spotify-profile-strengthening.md with a repo-aware implementation plan for strengthening live Spotify profile sync without making DynamoDB part of this step.

title: Review and fix Phase 3 API demo PR
description: Create the Phase 3 API-only demo PR, perform a PR-style code review, post findings to the PR, fix actionable observations, validate, and push the branch.
acceptance_criteria: A PR exists for feature/phase-3-api-only-demo into main. Review findings are posted on the PR. Actionable findings are fixed and validated. The branch is pushed and clean.
close_reason: Created PR #4, posted PR review findings, fixed the actionable issues, validated locally, commented with the fix summary, and pushed the branch.

title: Finish Phase 3 API-only demo
description: Implement Phase 3 from plans/beta-demo-agentic-recommender.md using the existing API skeleton: FastAPI health, recommendations, playlists, feedback, profile sync, and a local API run command with mocked tests and no live OpenAI or Spotify calls in CI.
acceptance_criteria: API exposes health, POST /recommendations, POST /playlists, POST /feedback, and profile sync/status routes. Recommendation responses include session ID, intent, ranked tracks, score breakdowns, explanations, and optional playlist candidate. Playlist creation is explicit and idempotent by session. Feedback persists locally. Profile sync normalizes Spotify user data to a taste profile cache. Local API run command is documented. Tests pass without live OpenAI/Spotify calls.
close_reason: Implemented Phase 3 API-only demo with FastAPI routes for recommendations, playlists, feedback, and profile sync; added local API CLI, demo scripts, docs, env defaults, and tests.

title: Start Phase 4 AWS serverless deployment foundation
description: Implement the first Phase 4 slice from plans/beta-demo-agentic-recommender.md: add a deployable AWS serverless foundation with SAM infrastructure, a Lambda adapter for the API app, DynamoDB/Secrets/S3 permissions, deployment docs, and tests that do not require AWS.
acceptance_criteria: SAM infrastructure defines API Gateway, Lambda, DynamoDB demo tables, Secrets Manager access, S3 read permissions, environment variables, and outputs. A Lambda handler wraps a minimal API health app and is covered by tests without live AWS. Phase 4 plan checklist is updated for completed deployment-foundation tasks. Validation passes and changes are committed on a feature branch.
close_reason: Completed the AWS serverless deployment foundation as part of the Phase 3 API branch: SAM template, Lambda handler, health route, docs, and tests are committed.

title: Review, fix, and merge Phase 2 agentic orchestration PR
description: Create a GitHub PR for feature/phase-2-agentic-orchestration into main, post the PR-style code review finding, fix the actionable orchestration observation, validate, and merge once resolved.
acceptance_criteria: PR exists for feature/phase-2-agentic-orchestration into main. The code review finding is posted on the PR, fixed, validated, and the PR is merged. Final git state is pushed and clean.
close_reason: Created PR #3, posted the code review finding, fixed the agent orchestrator runtime path, validated locally, and merged Phase 2 into main.

title: Review and merge Phase 1 deterministic recommender PR
description: Create a GitHub PR for feature/phase-1-deterministic-recommender-core into main, perform a PR-style code review, fix actionable observations if any, validate the branch, and merge only if no unresolved observations remain.
acceptance_criteria: A PR exists for feature/phase-1-deterministic-recommender-core into main. Review findings are resolved or documented. Validation passes. PR is merged if no blocking observations remain, and main is up to date with origin.
close_reason: Created PR #2, completed review, fixed the S3 catalog-loading observation, validated, and merged Phase 1 into main.

title: Implement Phase 2 agentic intent and orchestration
description: Build Phase 2 from plans/beta-demo-agentic-recommender.md: add OpenAI Agents SDK intent parsing and tool-backed orchestration over the deterministic recommender core, with guardrails preventing invented tracks and playlist side effects.
acceptance_criteria: A local command or API-adjacent service can take natural-language input and return ranked tracks with structured intent using deterministic tools. Tests cover tool contracts, output validation, and no-song-invention behavior without requiring live OpenAI or Spotify calls.
close_reason: Implemented Phase 2 agentic intent and orchestration with OpenAI Agents SDK integration, deterministic tool-backed recommendations, guardrails, local CLI, documentation, and tests. Forced because the dependency display still reports Phase 1 open even though bd show confirms it is closed.

title: Review and merge Phase 0 demo readiness PR
description: Create a GitHub PR for feature/phase-0-demo-readiness, perform a PR-style code review, fix any actionable findings, validate the branch, merge it into main, and push the final state.
acceptance_criteria: A PR exists for feature/phase-0-demo-readiness into main. Review findings are resolved or documented. Validation passes. PR is merged and main is up to date with origin.
close_reason: Created PR #1, performed code review with no blocking findings, validated, and merged Phase 0 into main.

title: Implement Phase 1 deterministic recommender core
description: Build the next phase from plans/beta-demo-agentic-recommender.md: full local/S3 recommender data readers, profile/domain models, deterministic scoring, explanations, and tests for a breakup/cheer-up prompt intent without requiring live OpenAI or Spotify calls.
acceptance_criteria: Unit tests cover loading tracks/audio features/lyrics/interactions from fixtures, scoring mood fit and taste affinity, diversity handling, empty candidate sets, and a breakup/cheer-up prompt scenario. Existing extraction and Phase 0 readiness tests continue to pass.
close_reason: Implemented Phase 1 deterministic recommender core with catalog readers, domain models, scoring, tests, and plan updates.

title: Complete live demo credential setup
description: Add the remaining local secrets for the beta demo without committing them: set OPENAI_API_KEY, register SPOTIFY_REDIRECT_URI in the Spotify developer dashboard, generate a Spotify user refresh token with the configured scopes, save SPOTIFY_USER_REFRESH_TOKEN in .env, and run music-recommender-demo-readiness refresh-spotify-token successfully.
acceptance_criteria: .env contains local-only OpenAI and Spotify user OAuth secrets. music-recommender-demo-readiness refresh-spotify-token returns a successful redacted status for the demo account. No secret values are committed or printed in logs.

title: Implement Phase 0 demo readiness
description: Add the beta demo readiness foundation from plans/beta-demo-agentic-recommender.md Phase 0: validated OpenAI/Spotify OAuth configuration, a user-scoped Spotify OAuth client that can refresh access tokens, and a local data-read smoke path for existing extracted Parquet outputs. Keep live secrets out of logs and keep tests fully mocked/local.
acceptance_criteria: Config exposes OpenAI, Spotify OAuth, demo user, data root, and data mode settings without leaking secret values. Spotify user client refreshes tokens through mocked HTTP and validates required playlist/profile scopes. A local readiness command/script can confirm extracted Parquet tracks/audio features are readable. Existing extraction tests continue to pass.
close_reason: Implemented Phase 0 demo readiness: config/env additions, Spotify user OAuth client and CLI setup commands, local data readiness checks, tests, docs, and validation.

title: Plan beta demo recommender implementation
description: Create a phased implementation plan for an AWS-deployed class demo of the natural-language music recommender using OpenAI Agents SDK, Spotify profile data, playlist creation, and existing extracted pipeline data.
close_reason: Created phased implementation plan for AWS-deployed OpenAI Agents SDK beta demo recommender.

title: Document recommender product architecture
description: Capture the brainstormed product and architecture direction for a natural-language Spotify-backed music recommender in docs.
close_reason: Architecture document was completed and committed previously; restoring closed status after Beads export reconciliation.
